name: Stock Rover
description_short: Deep fundamental analysis and stock screening platform for value investors and long-term portfolio builders.
description_long:
Stock Rover is the go-to platform for investors who prioritize fundamental analysis and long-term investing over short-term trading. The platform offers the deepest fundamental data screening available, with over 650 financial metrics, 10+ years of historical data, and sophisticated comparison tools.

The screener lets you filter stocks by detailed financial criteria that other platforms simply do not offer, including quality scores, growth rates, margin trends, and custom formulas. Stock Rover also provides portfolio analytics that help investors understand their exposure across sectors, risk factors, and correlation matrices.

With plans ranging from $7.99/month (Essentials) to $27.99/month (Premium Plus), Stock Rover offers exceptional value for fundamental investors. The platform is not designed for day trading or technical analysis, but for investors who want to make informed, data-driven decisions about what to own long-term.
pros: Deepest fundamental data with 650+ financial metrics
cons: Not suitable for day trading or technical analysis
Interface can feel overwhelming with data density
